titleStmt.title: SII 6.885: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 885. (A.R. No. 289 of 1899). IN THE TWENTY-FIRST NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśākava¨rṣē vasukharavimitē svacchakauḷīramāsadvādaśyāṁ sadvasiṣṭhānvayajaladhi
vidhōstaṁbbinētu[¨r*]gṛhiṇyāddattaṁ ddīpā¨rthakluptyai nnaraharipuratō vaikuḷalyaṁbayādyaṁ
māḍāṣaṭkaṁ sacihnatrayamiha ca paratrātmani śrēyasāya . svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbu
lu 1208 gunēṁṭi ka¨rkkaṭaka śukla dvādaśiyū bṛhaspativāramuna vasiṣṭagō
tramuna taṁbbināyakuni bhā¨ryyaAIna koḷalakamma tana vaṁśābhivriddhigā
nu śrīnarasiṁhanādhuni sannadhiyaṁddu Akhaṁḍadīpā¨rththamu selluṭaku Ā
ṟu māḍayu mūṁḍu cinnālu śrībhaṁḍārapravēśamu cēsiṁddigāna Ī dī
pā¨rththamu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu cellaṁggalayadi Ī dha¨rmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrīśrī
śatruṇapi kitō dha¨rmmaḥ palaniyyō manīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hi śatru syādha¨rmmaḥ śa
tru¨rnna kasyacit . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1210 gunēṁṭi jēṣṭa kṛṣṇa dvādaśiyu paṁḍitavāra
munāṁḍḍu vasiṣṭagōtrulaina taṁbbināyaku bhā¨ryya kōḷalamma tana saṁtānā
bhivriddhigānu munnu peṭina Aradīpāna pai gaṁḍalu Āṟu māḍayu reṁḍu cinnā
luṁgā neṟadīpamu Okkaṭiki śrībhaṁḍaramuṇa Oḍku gaṁ
ḍamāḍalu 12 ni 5 ni Ammajiyyalasannadi Ācaṁ
drā¨rkkastāIgā cellaṁggaladu Ī Ama dha¨rmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa
Ī yama koḍuku mādhavanāyaku tanaku saṁ
tānābhivṛdhigānu śrīnarasiṁhyanādhuniki
peṭṭina puṣpavāṭika nibaṁdhdha 1 ni nityamu sēvaṁtti
tirumāla cātuṭaku śrībhaṁḍāramuna Oḍku prāṁtta
malacinnālu paṁdomidipādika 1 . Ī dha¨rmmu
vu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa . śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.885 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
